description: Ed Cornmell was appointed Executive Director of the Long Term and High Security Estate in June 2025.  Long Term and High Security Estate is responsible for the safe, decent and secure management of Category A and B men in a range of custodial settings. Ed was previously Executive Director of the Youth Custody Service from October 2022, having prior to this been the Deputy Director responsible for prison operations nationally and Deputy Director for COVID-19 Prison Gold Command.  Ed previously worked in the Long Term and High Security Estate as Deputy Director and was Governor of HMP Full Sutton. Ed also Governed HMP Everthorpe, which became HMP Humber and, having started his career in policy delivery and spent time in Private Office, he has operated at all operational grades from Prison Officer to Governing Governor working in a range of custodial environments.

details.body:
Ed Cornmell was appointed Executive Director of the Long Term and High Security Estate in June 2025.  Long Term and High Security Estate is responsible for the safe, decent and secure management of Category A and B men in a range of custodial settings.

Ed was previously Executive Director of the Youth Custody Service from October 2022, having prior to this been the Deputy Director responsible for prison operations nationally and Deputy Director for COVID-19 Prison Gold Command. 

Ed previously worked in the Long Term and High Security Estate as Deputy Director and was Governor of HMP Full Sutton.

Ed also Governed HMP Everthorpe, which became HMP Humber and, having started his career in policy delivery and spent time in Private Office, he has operated at all operational grades from Prison Officer to Governing Governor working in a range of custodial environments.

Ed also Governed HMP Everthorpe, which became HMP Humber and, having started his career in policy delivery and spent time in Private Office, he has operated at all operational grades from Prison Officer to Governing Governor working in a range of custodial environments.

role_appointments.title: Ed Cornmell - Executive Director, High Security & long term estate

details.body:
Ed Cornmell was appointed Executive Director of the Long Term and High Security Estate in June 2025.  Long Term and High Security Estate is responsible for the safe, decent and secure management of Category A and B men in a range of custodial settings.

Ed was previously Executive Director of the Youth Custody Service from October 2022, having prior to this been the Deputy Director responsible for prison operations nationally and Deputy Director for COVID-19 Prison Gold Command. 

Ed previously worked in the Long Term and High Security Estate as Deputy Director and was Governor of HMP Full Sutton.

Ed also Governed HMP Everthorpe, which became HMP Humber and, having started his career in policy delivery and spent time in Private Office, he has operated at all operational grades from Prison Officer to Governing Governor working in a range of custodial environments.

• providing safe and decent child-centred care for children and young people remanded or sentenced to custody aged 10 to 18 in England and Wales
  • safeguarding children and young people in custody, and creating a supportive learning environment
  • improving the opportunities for children and young people in custody to support successful release and resettlement
  • direct operational delivery of 4 public sector under 18 Young Offender Institutions (YOIs) and oversight of a privately delivered YOI unit in Wales
  • commissioning of services, monitoring and contractual management of placements into Secure Children’s Homes, the Secure Training Centre and the first Secure School
  • strategic development of the Children and Young People’s Secure Estate including the delivery of the Secure School project

role_appointments.title: Ed Cornmell - Executive Director, Youth Custody Service

title: Ed Cornmell
